ddt:Target.Name: Radio 2012 NoDAB v2.0
ddt:Target.Description:
******************** HISTORY ******************** V1.4 : January 2012 :Deletion of Short Circuit to +BAT on Ext AMP ON DTC ($93 19 12) Change of PartNumber.BasicPartList from $01 to $02 (in $2180 request answer) Add Radio geographical area configuration (CNF_CNT)
V1.5 : Februry 2012 : Addition of X61ph2 applicability Addition of Daimler Identification service Addition of Australia to Radio Country configuration parameter (CNF_CNT) Deletion of B32 project applicability Correction of projects codes (H, L, C replaced by X)
V1.6 : March 2012 : Correction of ODX errors (request length, Auto-Ident) Addition of X07 Applicability
V1.7 ; March 2012 : Update of project applicability
V1.8 : April 2012 : Modification of IDENT-8 (HardwareNumber.BasicPartList) 00h value description (N/A replaced by HARDW) After Sales tag removed for the following DID: CNF_RSTx / CNF_SOUNDx / CNF_PACTx / CNF_RAD
V1.9 : May 2012 : Update of CNF_CNT parameter according to DSI v2.7
V2.0 : June 2012 : Addition of H45 Applicability Correction of BT device Adress size in IO Control $302A
V2.1 : August 2012 : Maintenability flag removed for :DataRead.ANT_3, DataRead.Microphone_Range_Value, DataRead.BluetoothDevice. Correction of OutputControl definitions V2.2 : February 2013 : Digiotal Radio reception parameter added CNF_RAD_DR
v2.3 March 2013 : Maintenabily flags checked for missing services
v2.4 : June 2013 : DTC $93 32 13 removed
v2.5 : March 2014 : Suppression of DAB data and requests Add Auto-Id of SW 3.1.1.4 0300 0112 and 0300 0114 Modification of the data CNF_SYS_AMP & CNF_SYS_NAV
v1.1 : March 2014 : Modification auto ident. New name "Radio_2012_V2.5" to "Radio_2012_NoDAB_v1.1"
v1.2 : March 2014 : Modification of the data HardwareNumber.BasicPartList: "HARDW" modify to "285J9"
v2.0 : February 2015 : Addition of HFP data and request

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked
test completed OK : default not present
Default not yet checked by the ECU
Default detected, confirmed but not more present
Request for availibility LID from 0 to 19
Request for availibility LID from 21 to 39
Problem in the test (not run, internal problem.)

Data.Name: Traceability year of production
Data.Description:
Year of production 2010 : $32 $30 $31 $30

Year of production 2011 : $32 $30 $31 $31

Year of production 2012 : $32 $30 $31 $32

Year of production 2013 : $32 $30 $31 $33

Year of production 2014 : $32 $30 $31 $34

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Item.Text: with no CAN ext amplifier X95type (FIRST&MID)
with CAN external amplifier X91 UUDT type (FIRST&MID)
with CAN ext amplifier X91 MPDT type (MID only)

Data.Name: LIN_WU.Sys_ON
Data.Comment: Sys_ON multimedia wake up from BICA2A3

Data.Name: VIN.CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: ECU Configuration.AM FM antenna phantom power supply
LID2A
Data.Comment: Bluetooth RSSI Start test (Only for Radio FIRST)

Data.Name: CANMMUX.Ref Messagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

DataItem.Name: ECU Configuration.AM FM antenna phantom power supply
ECU Configuration.AM FM antenna phantom power supply

Label.Text: The user can choice the session type :
- force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
- except for last after sales operation date, driving restriction, phone acoustic parameters, acoustic paremeters driver side and whole car, radio reception
test parameters reset is used to:
- reset the value of AM/FM/DR tuner parameters except min field value
- reset the Radio First fascia (pressed button since start)
AM FM antenna ph pw supply

Input.DataName: ECU Configuration.AM FM antenna phantom power supply

Display.DataName: ECU Configuration.AM FM antenna phantom power supply

Label.Text: Those parameters are used to configure the bluetooth phone.
This parameter is used to configure the whole car acoustic.
This parameter is used to configure the driver side acoustic.
This parameter is used to configure the common acoustic parameters.
This parameter is used to configure the Analog radio tuners.
Anti-theft field writable once and corresponding to
the first car's VID where the ECU is connected
AM FM antenna ph pw supply
Instantaneous fascia buttons values maintained pressed during 2s if no others actions

Button.Text: Reset memorized value of fascia buttons

Label.Text: Used for all radios MID and FIRST
Bluetooth device data (only for Radio First)
The data of the last connected bluetooth device processed by the radio First
To perform the measurement, unconnect all bluetooth device thought radio First screen, then connect one bluetooth device.
This routine is used to test microphone.
Radio First generates a sound on the stereo output and check if the sound is captured by the microphone.
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
You should be able to hear loudspeakers tone
In this part, the sound level is given as parameter.
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone on the four loudspeaker line at frequency 40 Hz. For this test, we use the maximum sound level : volume 31.
